message:
fix(export): handle nested formatting and mixed list types

1. Nested formatting: Changed bold pattern from [^*]+ to .+? (non-greedy)
   so asterisks can appear inside bold content. Added lookahead/lookbehind
   to italic pattern to avoid matching ** as two single *.
   Now **bold with *italic* inside** works correctly.

2. Mixed list types: Mark each <li> with data-lt attribute to track its
   type (ul/ol). When wrapping, group consecutive items of same type and
   create separate wrappers when type changes.
   Now unordered and ordered lists mixed together render correctly.

Added 4 new tests for these behaviors.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
